name: DSG Global Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview When used in the Annual Report, the terms Company, we, our, us, DSG, or VTS mean DSG Global, Inc., its subsidiary Vantage Tag Systems Inc., and its wholly owned subsidiaries DSG Tag Systems International, Ltd. and Imperium Motor Company and Imperium Motor of Canada Corporation (together Imperium).
